---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an operator, API, builder improvement, or example
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or use case. What workflow or integration is hard today?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you would like to see. For schema or operator changes, explain how
it fits the adjacency-list JSON model (no DSL, no eval).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered.

## Scope

- [ ] Core package (`@journeys/core`)
- [ ] Builder UI
- [ ] Examples / docs
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Links to docs, prior art, or example workflows.
